products.name: Aceto Balsamico Tradizionale di Modena DOP
pros: Authentic flavor from selected grape varieties

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 review highlights the traditional DOP as the most authentic option and the IGP as the most accessible, offering clear guidance for consumers.
videoSource: Aceto balsamico: come scegliere quello giusto
